productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men New Gemma Tan Casual Shoe
description: This buckaroo men New Gemma Brown Casual shoe is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing and rivets on the upper leather. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Leather upper for added durability and style Leather overlay riveted on the forefoot, midfoot and heel for better support Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Appliqued branding on the tongue Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Well-cushioned nubuck footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Slip-resistant TPR outsole for better shock absorption and grip Textured elevated ridges on the outsole for enhanced traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
